calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Timothy R. Carter, Esq. appeared with petitioners Maria Dolores Oropeza-Singh and Jaspal Singh, who were present as Guardians ad litem for the minor, Arman Singh Mander.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Maria Dolores Oropeza-Mander.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Arman Singh Oropeza Mander.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
